In the event of his living upto his 25th year, he will become a father of

Therefore, in view ofthe examples described above, it may be ClXI~
eluded that when Jupiter has no planet either in the adjacent houses or in the

IMIDRrANT CHARTS 199
7th house, the native of such a horoscope will be short-lived.
If Saturn is similarly disposed, the native of such a horoscope will
experience poverty and difficulties in life. These matters should never be
revealed and the revealer will suffer extreme difficulties.
CHART 278
The native of this horoscope is of mediocre education. Mercury is in the
second house from Mars. Saturn and Mercury have exchanged houses. Saturn
is with the Moon and Rahu. The interchange of Saturn and Mercury causes
such effect as if Mercury is in
Sat.
